title: Portfolio Redesign v3
description: The site you're on right now. A playful developer redesign with an interactive terminal, git-log-styled experience timeline, and a dual green/pink identity for code and community. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

title: My Jane's Walk
description: A scheduling and exploration app for Jane's Walk, a global festival of walking tours. Built with React and Vite. Jane's Walk Toronto was inspired by this project and built their own version, now live at their official site.

title: TechTank Website
description: Open-source community website for Toronto's tech and startup community. Contributor and maintainer, writing content and managing code updates. Built with Next.js and hosted on Vercel.

title: Portfolio Redesign v2
description: A major redesign focusing on visual impact and interactions. Light/dark mode, smooth animations, and nature-inspired forest palette. Built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion.

title: Portfolio Redesign v1
description: The previous iteration of this portfolio. A sidebar-based design with a focus on simplicity and clean typography.

title: Code Quiz
description: An interactive timed coding quiz to test your skills, with a highscores page. Built using jQuery and local storage.

title: Workday Scheduler
description: A web application to help you schedule your workday. Built using Moment.js to display the current time and local storage.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: A weather dashboard that uses OpenWeather API to retrieve weather data for cities and maintains a search history using local storage.
